---
title: 'Open Access: Options, Requirements, and Funding Possibilities'
categories: Workshop
event:
  description: ''
  start_date: '2020-01-20'
  end_date: ''
  time: ''
  location:
    name: Leopoldstr. 30, Training room S1, ground floor
    address: ''
    map_url: ''
  format:
    type: Workshop
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: ''
links:
  registration: ''
  materials: ''
  workshop_website: ''
event_description: ''
instructors:
  - name: Prof. Dr. Felix Schönbrodt
    url: ''
  - name: Volker Schallehn
    url: ''
  - name: Andrea Dorner
    url: ''
  - name: Vanessa Gabriel
    url: ''
  - name: Dr. Veit Schwab
    url: ''
  - name: Dr. Anna Pahl
    url: ''
helpers:
  - name: ''
contact:
  name: Forschungs Förderung
  email: forschungsfoerderung@verwaltung.uni-muenchen.de
organizers:
  - name: Dr. Veit Schwab
    url: ''
  - name: Dr. Anna Pahl
    url: ''
host:
  - name: LMU Open Science Center
    url: ''
  - name: LMU University Library (UB)
    url: ''
  - name: LMU Research Funding Unit
    url: ''

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---

<br>


<p>We are offering a workshop on Open Access addressing LMU researches from all disciplines and of all career levels above PhD on 20 January 2020. The workshop aims at providing orientation on Open Access publications in general, on the available options before, during and after a research project as well as on specific requirements and funding possibilities by different funders.</p><p>The LMU Munich Open Science Center, the University Library and the Unit for Research Funding join forces to present you an overview on Open Access in order to enhance transparency and provide you with the necessary tools to fulfil the guidelines of research funders such as DFG and European Commission.</p><p>The workshop consists of information and discussion sessions and invites attendees to participate actively. Please spread this information to other interested LMU researchers. The number of participants is limited, slots will be available on a first come, first serve basis</p><p> </p><div class="g-clear"></div>
